channel.title: Hello, I'm QA Automation Engineer on Iurii Kriazhevskikh | QA Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Hello, I'm QA Automation Engineer on Iurii Kriazhevskikh | QA Engineer

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am a QA Automation Engineer with over 5 years of commercial experience testing enterprise web, desktop, and backend applications. My core expertise is test automation with Python (Pytest, Playwright, Requests), along with manual testing, API testing, SQL, and performance testing.

Key Skills:

  • Automation: Python, Pytest, Playwright, Requests, Selenium WebDriver (C#), NUnit, RestSharp
  • API Testing: Postman, Swagger, REST Assured
  • Databases: SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL) – complex queries, JOINs, stored procedures
  • Tools: Azure DevOps, Git, Docker, Grafana, Zabbix, Apache JMeter
  • Methodologies: Agile, Scrum, full testing lifecycle

Professional Experience:

item.title: Contact
item.description:
You can reach me through the following channels:

  • Email: iurii.kriazhevskikh@icloud.com
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/iurii-kriazhevskikh
  • GitHub: github.com/YuriiKriazhevskikh
  • Telegram: @duralexsedlexspb

I am open to collaboration and discussing new opportunities.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Test Automation for Flight Booking Platform Link to heading

  • Stack: Python, Pytest, Playwright, Requests, SQL, Azure DevOps
  • Developed and maintained automated test suites for FareWise (web) and TravelWise (desktop) applications.
  • Validated end-to-end booking workflows, GDS integrations (Amadeus, Sabre, Galileo), and database consistency.
  • Integrated automated tests into CI/CD pipelines for daily regression runs.
  • Performed performance testing with Apache JMeter, identified bottlenecks, and contributed to load balancer implementation.

API Testing and Data Validation Link to heading

  • Stack: Python Requests, Postman, Swagger, SQL
  • Created a comprehensive REST API test suite covering positive/negative scenarios, JSON/XML validation.
  • Performed complex SQL queries to reconcile data between API responses and backend databases.

Performance & Load Testing Link to heading

  • Stack: Apache JMeter, Grafana, Prometheus
  • Designed and executed load tests to simulate high user concurrency, analysed metrics, and helped optimise system performance.
